ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was listed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "display_address" TEXT /* Display address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property per month */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Full street address of the property */,
  "interest_level_id" INTEGER /* Interest level ID */,
  "elevator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has an elevator */,
  "cats_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if cats are allowed in the property */,
  "hardwood_floors" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has hardwood floors */,
  "dogs_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if dogs are allowed in the property */,
  "doorman" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a doorman */,
  "dishwasher" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a dishwasher */,
  "no_fee" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has no broker fee */,
  "laundry_in_building" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has laundry facilities in the building */,
  "fitness_center" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a fitness center */,
  "pre_war" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is pre-war */,
  "laundry_in_unit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has laundry facilities in the unit */,
  "roof_deck" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a roof deck */,
  "outdoor_space" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has outdoor space */,
  "dining_room" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a dining room */,
  "high_speed_internet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has high-speed internet */,
  "balcony" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a balcony */,
  "swimming_pool" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a swimming pool */,
  "new_construction" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is new construction */,
  "exclusive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is an exclusive listing */,
  "terrace" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a terrace */,
  "loft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is a loft */,
  "garden_patio" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a garden patio */,
  "common_outdoor_space" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a common outdoor space */,
  "wheelchair_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has wheelchair access */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager responsible for the listing */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent managing the listing */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* URL of the featured image for the property */,
  "virtual_tour_url" TEXT /* URL of the virtual tour for the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company the property manager works for */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture for the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the real estate agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the real estate agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the real estate agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company the real estate agent works for */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture for the real estate agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., elevator, hardwood floors, fitness center) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the inquiry is about */,
  "inquirer_name" TEXT /* Name of the inquirer */,
  "inquirer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inquirer */,
  "inquirer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inquirer */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or comment from the inquirer */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inquiry status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., available, rented, sold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiry_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, responded, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the lease is for */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent_amount" INTEGER /* Monthly rent amount */,
  "security_deposit" INTEGER /* Security deposit amount */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the request is for */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
